title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LACAREN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

chunks.text:
H. No. 4338 / 57 OG No. 13, 2293 (March 27, 1961)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2898, June 19, 1960 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF LACAREN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF CUYO, PROVINCE OF PALAWAN.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitio of Lacaren in the Municipality of Cuyo, Province of Palawan, is converted into a barrio of said municipality, to be known as the barrio of Lacaren.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, June 19, 1960.
